page_title: List of Attack on Titan: Junior High chapters
text:
This is a list containing all the chapters from the Attack on Titan: Junior High manga series.

Trivia

Kodansha Comics USA has decided to release the English version in a 2-in-1 format, as opposed to one volume at a time, with the exception of the final volume being a 3-in-1 format due to the odd number of total volumes.
